children.name:
Timed out after 600.001s.
Expected
    <bool>: false
to be true
[It] Hazelcast Map Config with Persistence should fail when persistence of Map CR and Hazelcast CR do not match [map_persistence, fast]

Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.96.1.73]:5701, tx: ca3e665f-f0cc-4d6b-9777-1d1fa3544f87, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.96.0.69]:5701, lockOwnerId='f33c0db9-fcbf-4057-9b58-b27ce6aa14af', lockExpiryTime=1658482296260}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled should successfully restart from HotBackup data with HostPath configuration multiple nodes [hz_persistence, slow]

Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.96.1.62]:5701, tx: 6bf3ffca-680a-4762-8c85-a5f65b2f222e, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.96.0.52]:5701, lockOwnerId='7112340f-16dc-4c5a-a9ca-fcc97f55fa8b', lockExpiryTime=1658482132981}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled should trigger ForceStart when restart from HotBackup failed [hz_persistence, slow]

Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.96.0.51]:5701, tx: 59bc908d-2460-49c0-aa49-b56bf3e413ab, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.96.1.58]:5701, lockOwnerId='73654a58-f05b-4f87-8ceb-997cd6a146ac', lockExpiryTime=1658482139393}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled should successfully trigger HotBackup [hz_persistence, slow]
